task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A base step is created with the correct dimensions
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D box/cube is visible in the viewport, and the property editor shows dimensions corresponding to 1000 mm, 280 mm, and 180 mm.

task_completion.description: Multiple steps are arranged in a continuous straight flight
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows multiple steps arranged diagonally upwards in a straight line, forming a staircase.

task_completion.description: Exactly 10 steps are present in the staircase
task_completion.visual_evidence: Counting the individual treads/steps in the 3D viewport reveals exactly 10 steps.

task_completion.description: The final model is a single fused object or compound
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tree View (Combo View) shows a single parent object (like a 'Fusion', 'Compound', 'Array', or 'Part') that contains or represents the entire staircase, rather than just 10 independent, unlinked boxes.

task_completion.description: The file is saved as staircase.FCStd
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar, tab name, or a save dialog shows the filename 'staircase.FCStd'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking menus, using the FreeCAD Python console, or interacting with the FreeCAD interface, rather than just writing a script in a generic text editor.
The FreeCAD 3D viewport actually renders the staircase geometry, proving the file wasn't just spoofed as an empty file.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the task using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply use 'touch /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/staircase.FCStd' or a similar terminal command to create an empty file with the target name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'staircase.FCStd'. The staircase must have exactly 10 steps. Each step is 1000 mm (X) x 280 mm (Y) x 180 mm (Z). The total bounding box of the final staircase should be 1000 mm x 2800 mm x 1800 mm. The final model must be a single fused object or compound.
